message:
fix(tools): harden content hash coverage in benchmark methodology and replication claims

Benchmark methodology (benchmark_methodology.rs):
- Extract compute_publication_hash() covering all mutable fields: pub_id,
  title, topic, authors, status, sections, citations,
  reproducibility_checklist, pub_version, created_at, updated_at —
  replacing ad-hoc hash that only covered title/topic/sections
- Recompute content_hash on status transitions and citation additions
  (previously only computed at creation)
- Extract compute_catalog_hash() covering by_topic, by_status, and
  pub_version (previously only covered total/by_topic/pub_version)
- Add tests: hash covers authors/citations/reproducibility_checklist,
  transition_status and add_citation refresh hash, catalog hash covers
  by_status

External replication claims (external_replication_claims.rs):
- Extract compute_catalog_content_hash() covering total, published,
  pending, claims_by_category, and schema_version — replacing inline
  hash that only covered total/published/schema_version
- Bump hash version prefix to v2
- Add tests: catalog hash changes with category distribution, catalog
  hash matches reported surface

Verification scripts:
- check_benchmark_methodology.py: add publication_hash_surface,
  publication_mutation_rehash, and catalog_hash_surface checks
- check_external_replication_claims.py: add catalog_hashing check
- tests: add corresponding assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,10 +59,32 @@ def ok(name, passed, detail=""):
         ok(f"struct_{st}", f"struct {st}" in src, st)
 
     ok("content_hashing", "content_hash" in src and "Sha256" in src, "SHA-256 integrity")
+    ok(
+        "publication_hash_surface",
+        all(token in src for token in [
+            '"authors"',
+            '"citations"',
+            '"reproducibility_checklist"',
+            '"status"',
+            '"created_at"',
+            '"updated_at"',
+        ]),
+        "Publication hash covers mutable publication fields",
+    )
+    ok(
+        "publication_mutation_rehash",
+        len(re.findall(r"content_hash\s*=\s*compute_publication_hash\((?:&)?pub_entry\)", src)) >= 3,
+        "Create/status/citation paths reseal Publication.content_hash",
+    )
     ok("reproducibility_checklist", "ChecklistItem" in src and "reproducibility_checklist" in src,
        "Checklist with verified flag")
     ok("catalog_generation", "generate_catalog" in src and "PublicationCatalog" in src,
        "Catalog with by_topic/by_status")
+    ok(
+        "catalog_hash_surface",
+        all(token in src for token in ['"by_topic"', '"by_status"', "compute_catalog_hash"]),
+        "Catalog hash covers by_topic and by_status",
+    )
     ok("search_by_topic", "search_by_topic" in src, "Topic-based search")
 
     found_codes = [c for c in REQUIRED_CODES if c in src]

@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ def ok(n, p, d=""): r.append({"check": n, "passed": p, "detail": d})
     ok("publication_gating", "can_publish" in src and "publish_claim" in src, "Threshold-gated publication")
     ok("evidence_linking", "link_evidence" in src and "evidence_refs" in src, "Evidence chain")
     ok("content_hash", "content_hash" in src and "Sha256" in src, "SHA-256 hashing")
+    ok("catalog_hashing", all(token in src for token in ["compute_catalog_content_hash", "pending_claims", "claims_by_category"]), "Catalog hash seals pending/category surface")
     ok("event_codes", sum(1 for c in CODES if c in src) >= 12, f"{sum(1 for c in CODES if c in src)}/12")
     ok("invariants", sum(1 for i in INVS if i in src) >= 6, f"{sum(1 for i in INVS if i in src)}/6")
     ok("audit_log", "ErcAuditRecord" in src and "export_audit_log_jsonl" in src, "JSONL export")

@@ -74,12 +74,21 @@ def test_struct_engine(self, results):
     def test_content_hashing(self, results):
         assert results["content_hashing"]["passed"]
 
+    def test_publication_hash_surface(self, results):
+        assert results["publication_hash_surface"]["passed"]
+
+    def test_publication_mutation_rehash(self, results):
+        assert results["publication_mutation_rehash"]["passed"]
+
     def test_reproducibility_checklist(self, results):
         assert results["reproducibility_checklist"]["passed"]
 
     def test_catalog_generation(self, results):
         assert results["catalog_generation"]["passed"]
 
+    def test_catalog_hash_surface(self, results):
+        assert results["catalog_hash_surface"]["passed"]
+
     def test_search_by_topic(self, results):
         assert results["search_by_topic"]["passed"]

@@ -69,6 +69,7 @@ def test_replication_tracking(self, results): assert results["replication_tracki
     def test_publication_gating(self, results): assert results["publication_gating"]["passed"]
     def test_evidence_linking(self, results): assert results["evidence_linking"]["passed"]
     def test_content_hash(self, results): assert results["content_hash"]["passed"]
+    def test_catalog_hashing(self, results): assert results["catalog_hashing"]["passed"]
     def test_event_codes(self, results): assert results["event_codes"]["passed"]
     def test_invariants(self, results): assert results["invariants"]["passed"]
     def test_audit_log(self, results): assert results["audit_log"]["passed"]
